categories.label: Objective Completion
categories.description: How effectively the learner completed the practical objective of the scenario.
what_low_looks_like: Ends the interaction without completing the objective

categories.label: Empathy
categories.description: How well the learner acknowledged patient emotion, uncertainty, or discomfort.
what_high_looks_like: Responds to anxiety without sounding dismissive

categories.label: Product Knowledge
categories.description: How accurately the learner demonstrated understanding of the procedure, test, or issue being addressed.
what_high_looks_like: Understands what a good result should look like
Recognizes poor image quality or technique problems
Explains the procedure accurately when needed
what_low_looks_like: Gives inaccurate or incomplete procedural guidance

categories.label: Communication Clarity
categories.description: How clear, usable, and step-by-step the learner’s instructions were.
what_high_looks_like: Uses language the patient can follow easily

categories.label: Confidence
categories.description: How calm, assured, and in-control the learner sounded while guiding the interaction.
what_high_looks_like: Maintains patient trust during retakes or redirection
